creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: mat
Date: Mon Aug 29 14:53:02 UTC 2016
New revision: 421063
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/421063

Log:
  Update sysutils/qjail to 5.0 to handle FreeBSD 11+.

  Copy it to sysutils/qjail4 for FreeBSD 10 and sync CONFLICTS with the
  FreeBSD 8/9 version.

  PR:		212201, 212202
  Submitted by:	maintainer
  Sponsored by:	Absolight

  head/sysutils/qjail/Makefile
  head/sysutils/qjail/distinfo
  head/sysutils/qjail/pkg-descr
  head/sysutils/qjail/pkg-message
  head/sysutils/qjail/pkg-plist
  head/sysutils/qjail2/Makefile
  head/sysutils/qjail4/
  head/sysutils/qjail4/Makefile
  head/sysutils/qjail4/pkg-descr
